title: Subsets
coreIdea: Generate all possible subsets of a given array by exploring, at each element, the choice to either include it or exclude it, recursively building up all combinations.
recognitionCues: no ordering constraint on elements within a subset
power set of size 2^n expected in output
approach: Use recursion with an index parameter and a current subset list. At each call, add the current subset to results, then for each remaining element, include it, recurse, then backtrack (remove it) before trying the next element.
spaceComplexity: O(n) recursion depth, O(2^n * n) for output
